infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoadSOS needs your location to transmit precise coordinates in the event of an emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RoadSOS needs background location access to monitor for inactivity and track coordinates during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: RoadSOS tracks your location in the background to ensure you remain active during emergency monitoring.
